summary: Repaired deterministic validation failures by routing each validator-identified security-sensitive seed PR to central OpenClaw security handling. No GitHub mutations, closure, merge, or fix actions are planned; each route_security action targets the exact PR ref only.

actions.reason: Validator classified this exact PR as security-sensitive, so ProjectClownfish must quarantine it to central OpenClaw security handling without comment, close, merge, or fix mutation.
